officialDocs.requirement: 0G DA live submission requires DA Client, Encoder, and Retriever. Common local ports: DA Client gRPC 51001, Encoder 34000, Retriever 34005.

body.reason: Missing OG_DA_CLIENT_GRPC_URL. Run 0G DA Client plus Encoder/Retriever, then restart this sidecar.

reason: 0G DA stack is not live yet. Generated .da-stack files exist, but Docker/Colima and/or compose/DA processes are not ready. Start Colima or Docker, ensure Docker Compose is available, build official DA images, run the compose stack, and set OG_DA_CLIENT_GRPC_URL=127.0.0.1:51001.
